_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 3 match_mode values in banned_recalled_ingredients.json (active/disabled/historical). Internal taxonomy ID — controls whether the rule fires in scoring.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for match_mode labels. Drives the rule-engine on/off behavior; surfaced in admin/audit views.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/banned_recalled_ingredients.json `match_mode` field (146 entries; live: active=142, historical=3, disabled=1).

field_contract.name: User-facing label.
field_contract.fires_in_scoring: Boolean indicating whether rules with this match_mode contribute to scoring.

match_modes.name: Active
match_modes.notes: Rule actively fires in scoring and surfaces in user-facing alerts. Default state for new entries.

match_modes.name: Disabled
match_modes.notes: Rule is intentionally disabled and does NOT fire in scoring. Kept in data for audit history.

match_modes.name: Historical
match_modes.notes: Rule covers a historical recall or regulatory action no longer active. Does NOT fire in scoring but documents the past event.
